_comment: Cherrypick orchestration config. Module paths are resolved relative to this file's directory; never hardcode absolute paths. Copy to config.json and adjust as needed.

calibration._comment: Optional. `cherrypick calibrate` reads paper P&L per risk profile and advises promotion up this ladder (advisory only; never switches live risk). Omit 'ladder' to get readings without recommendations. 'deliberate_only' rungs are never auto-recommended; 'rule' overrides the default {min_days:14, min_win_rate:0.6, min_sample:20}.

watchdog._drawdown_note: Optional paper-P&L drift alert (net-of-cost). Add a 'drawdown' block to enable: {"suite_floor": -1000, "module_floors": {"meic": -750, "earnings": -750}, "critical_multiplier": 2}. net<=floor -> WARN; net<=floor*critical_multiplier -> CRITICAL. Paper only; never trades. Omit to disable.

dashboard._comment: Read-only status dashboard: static self-contained HTML regenerated on each watchdog tick and by `cherrypick dashboard`. 'output' is relative to this file's directory.

trade_notify._comment: Dedicated low-latency task that pushes new paper entries/exits to trade_channels. Runs far more often than the watchdog so fills reach you within ~interval_minutes instead of a full watchdog cycle.

notify._channels_note: push channels: 'log' (always on, the floor), 'desktop', 'slack', 'discord'. Slack/Discord webhook URLs live in the OS keyring (cherrypick secrets-set --channel slack|discord), never in this file or env vars.
